title: Supply Chain Manager - IndiaPost - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - IndiaPost - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with IndiaPost! We are hiring a Supply Chain Manager for our Patna team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About IndiaPost:
IndiaPost is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiaPost!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
